1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class Admin::ModerationAction < Admin::BaseAction
4:   TYPES = %w(
5:     delete
6:     mark_as_sensitive
7:   ).freeze
8: 
9:   validates :report_id, presence: true
10: 
11:   private
12: 
13:   def status_ids
14:     report.status_ids
15:   end
16: 
17:   def statuses
18:     @statuses ||= Status.with_discarded.where(id: status_ids).reorder(nil)
19:   end
20: 
21:   def collections
22:     report.collections
23:   end
24: 
25:   def process_action!
26:     case type
27:     when 'delete'
28:       handle_delete!
29:     when 'mark_as_sensitive'
30:       handle_mark_as_sensitive!
31:     end
32:   end
33: 
34:   def handle_delete!
35:     statuses.each { |status| authorize([:admin, status], :destroy?) }
36:     collections.each { |collection| authorize([:admin, collection], :destroy?) }
37: 
38:     ApplicationRecord.transaction do
39:       delete_statuses!
40:       delete_collections!
41: 
42:       resolve_report!
43:       process_strike!(:delete_statuses)
44: 
45:       create_tombstones! unless target_account.local?
46:     end
47: 
48:     process_notification!
49: 
50:     RemovalWorker.push_bulk(status_ids) { |status_id| [status_id, { 'preserve' => target_account.local?, 'immediate' => !target_account.local? }] }
51:   end
52: 
53:   def handle_mark_as_sensitive!
54:     collections.each { |collection| authorize([:admin, collection], :update?) }
55: 
56:     # Can't use a transaction here because UpdateStatusService queues
57:     # Sidekiq jobs
58:     mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
59:     mark_collections_as_sensitive!
60: 
61:     resolve_report!
62:     process_strike!(:mark_statuses_as_sensitive)
63:     process_notification!
64:   end
65: 
66:   def delete_statuses!
67:     statuses.each do |status|
68:       status.discard_with_reblogs
69:       log_action(:destroy, status)
70:     end
71:   end
72: 
73:   def delete_collections!
74:     collections.each do |collection|
75:       collection.destroy!
76:       log_action(:destroy, collection)
77:     end
78:   end
79: 
80:   def create_tombstones!
81:     (statuses + collections).each { |record| Tombstone.find_or_create_by(uri: record.uri, account: target_account, by_moderator: true) }
82:   end
83: 
84:   def mark_statuses_as_sensitive!
85:     representative_account = Account.representative
86: 
87:     statuses.includes(:media_attachments, preview_cards_status: :preview_card).find_each do |status|
88:       next if status.discarded? || !(status.with_media? || status.with_preview_card?)
89: 
90:       authorize([:admin, status], :update?)
91: 
92:       if target_account.local?
93:         UpdateStatusService.new.call(status, representative_account.id, sensitive: true)
94:       else
95:         status.update(sensitive: true)
96:       end
97: 
98:       log_action(:update, status)
99:     end
100:   end
101: 
102:   def mark_collections_as_sensitive!
103:     collections.each do |collection|
104:       UpdateCollectionService.new.call(collection, sensitive: true)
105: 
106:       log_action(:update, collection)
107:     end
108:   end
109: 
110:   def resolve_report!
111:     report.resolve!(current_account)
112:     log_action(:resolve, report)
113:   end
114: 
115:   def target_account
116:     report.target_account
117:   end
118: 
119:   def text_for_warning = text
120: end

(End of file - total 120 lines)

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class Admin::StatusFilter
4:   KEYS = %i(
5:     media
6:     report_id
7:   ).freeze
8: 
9:   IGNORED_PARAMS = %w(page report_id).freeze
10: 
11:   attr_reader :params
12: 
13:   def initialize(account, params)
14:     @account = account
15:     @params  = params
16:   end
17: 
18:   def results
19:     scope = @account.statuses.distributable_visibility
20: 
21:     params.each do |key, value|
22:       next if IGNORED_PARAMS.include?(key.to_s)
23: 
24:       scope.merge!(scope_for(key, value.to_s.strip)) if value.present?
25:     end
26: 
27:     scope
28:   end
29: 
30:   private
31: 
32:   def scope_for(key, _value)
33:     case key.to_s
34:     when 'media'
35:       Status.joins(:media_attachments).merge(@account.media_attachments).group(:id).recent
36:     else
37:       raise Mastodon::InvalidParameterError, "Unknown filter: #{key}"
38:     end
39:   end
40: end

1: # frozen_string_literal: true
2: 
3: class ActivityPub::ProcessStatusUpdateService < BaseService
4:   include JsonLdHelper
5:   include Redisable
6:   include Lockable
7: 
8:   CRAWL_DELAY = 1.minute
9:   PROCESSING_DELAY = (30.seconds)..(10.minutes)
10: 
11:   def call(status, activity_json, object_json, request_id: nil)
12:     raise ArgumentError, 'Status has unsaved changes' if status.changed?
13: 
14:     @activity_json             = activity_json
15:     @json                      = object_json
16:     @status_parser             = ActivityPub::Parser::StatusParser.new(@json, followers_collection: status.account.followers_url, following_collection: status.account.following_url, actor_uri: ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(status.account))
17:     @uri                       = @status_parser.uri
18:     @status                    = status
19:     @account                   = status.account
20:     @media_attachments_changed = false
21:     @poll_changed              = false
22:     @quote_changed             = false
23:     @request_id                = request_id
24:     @quote                     = nil
25: 
26:     return @status if !expected_type? || already_updated_more_recently?
27: 
28:     if @status_parser.edited_at.present? && (@status.edited_at.nil? || @status_parser.edited_at > @status.edited_at)
29:       handle_explicit_update!
30:     elsif @status.edited_at.present? && (@status_parser.edited_at.nil? || @status_parser.edited_at < @status.edited_at)
31:       # This is an older update, reject it
32:       return @status
33:     else
34:       handle_implicit_update!
35:     end
36: 
37:     @status
38:   end
39: 
40:   private
41: 
42:   def handle_explicit_update!
43:     last_edit_date = @status.edited_at.presence || @status.created_at
44: 
45:     # Only allow processing one create/update per status at a time
46:     with_redis_lock("create:#{@uri}") do
47:       Status.transaction do
48:         record_previous_edit!
49:         update_media_attachments!
50:         update_interaction_policies!
51:         update_poll!
52:         update_immediate_attributes!
53:         update_metadata!
54:         update_counts!
55:         create_edits!
56:       end
57: 
58:       fetch_and_verify_quote!(@quote, @quote_approval_uri, @status_parser.quote_uri) if @quote.present?
59:       download_media_files!
60:       queue_poll_notifications!
61: 
62:       next unless significant_changes?
63: 
64:       reset_preview_card!
65:       broadcast_updates!
66:     end
67: 
68:     forward_activity! if significant_changes? && @status_parser.edited_at > last_edit_date
69:   end
70: 
71:   def handle_implicit_update!
72:     with_redis_lock("create:#{@uri}") do
73:       update_interaction_policies!
74:       update_poll!(allow_significant_changes: false)
75:       queue_poll_notifications!
76:       update_quote_approval!
77:       update_counts!
78:     end
79: 
80:     broadcast_updates! if @status.quote&.state_previously_changed?
81:   end
82: 
83:   def update_interaction_policies!
84:     @status.update(quote_approval_policy: @status_parser.quote_policy)
85:   end
86: 
87:   def update_media_attachments!
88:     previous_media_attachments     = @status.media_attachments.to_a
89:     previous_media_attachments_ids = @status.ordered_media_attachment_ids || previous_media_attachments.map(&:id)
90:     @next_media_attachments        = []
91: 
92:     as_array(@json['attachment']).each do |attachment|
93:       media_attachment_parser = ActivityPub::Parser::MediaAttachmentParser.new(attachment)
94: 
95:       next if media_attachment_parser.remote_url.blank? || @next_media_attachments.size > Status::MEDIA_ATTACHMENTS_LIMIT
96: 
97:       begin
98:         media_attachment   = previous_media_attachments.find { |previous_media_attachment| previous_media_attachment.remote_url == media_attachment_parser.remote_url }
99:         media_attachment ||= MediaAttachment.new(account: @account, remote_url: media_attachment_parser.remote_url)
100: 
101:         # If a previously existing media attachment was significantly updated, mark
102:         # media attachments as changed even if none were added or removed
103:         @media_attachments_changed = true if media_attachment_parser.significantly_changes?(media_attachment)
104: 
105:         media_attachment.description          = media_attachment_parser.description
106:         media_attachment.focus                = media_attachment_parser.focus
107:         media_attachment.thumbnail_remote_url = media_attachment_parser.thumbnail_remote_url
108:         media_attachment.blurhash             = media_attachment_parser.blurhash
109:         media_attachment.status_id            = @status.id
110:         media_attachment.skip_download        = unsupported_media_type?(media_attachment_parser.file_content_type) || skip_download?
111:         media_attachment.save!
112: 
113:         @next_media_attachments << media_attachment
114:       rescue Addressable::URI::InvalidURIError => e
115:         Rails.logger.debug { "Invalid URL in attachment: #{e}" }
116:       end
117:     end
118: 
119:     @status.ordered_media_attachment_ids = @next_media_attachments.map(&:id)
120: 
121:     @media_attachments_changed = true if @status.ordered_media_attachment_ids != previous_media_attachments_ids
122: 
123:     @status.media_attachments.reload if @media_attachments_changed
124:   end
125: 
126:   def download_media_files!
127:     @next_media_attachments.each do |media_attachment|
128:       next if media_attachment.skip_download
129: 
130:       media_attachment.download_file! if media_attachment.remote_url_previously_changed?
131:       media_attachment.download_thumbnail! if media_attachment.thumbnail_remote_url_previously_changed?
132:       media_attachment.save
133:     rescue Mastodon::UnexpectedResponseError, *Mastodon::HTTP_CONNECTION_ERRORS
134:       RedownloadMediaWorker.perform_in(rand(PROCESSING_DELAY), media_attachment.id)
135:     rescue Seahorse::Client::NetworkingError => e
136:       Rails.logger.warn "Error storing media attachment: #{e}"
137:     end
138: 
139:     @status.media_attachments.reload
140:   end
141: 
142:   def update_poll!(allow_significant_changes: true)
143:     previous_poll        = @status.preloadable_poll
144:     @previous_expires_at = previous_poll&.expires_at
145:     poll_parser          = ActivityPub::Parser::PollParser.new(@json)
146: 
147:     if poll_parser.valid?
148:       poll = previous_poll || @account.polls.new(status: @status)
149: 
150:       # If for some reasons the options were changed, it invalidates all previous
151:       # votes, so we need to remove them
152:       @poll_changed = true if poll_parser.significantly_changes?(poll)
153:       return if @poll_changed && !allow_significant_changes
154: 
155:       poll.last_fetched_at = Time.now.utc
156:       poll.options         = poll_parser.options
157:       poll.multiple        = poll_parser.multiple
158:       poll.expires_at      = poll_parser.expires_at
159:       poll.voters_count    = poll_parser.voters_count
160:       poll.cached_tallies  = poll_parser.cached_tallies
161:       poll.reset_votes! if @poll_changed
162:       poll.save!
163: 
164:       @status.poll_id = poll.id
165:     elsif previous_poll.present?
166:       return unless allow_significant_changes
167: 
168:       previous_poll.destroy!
169:       @poll_changed = true
170:       @status.poll_id = nil
171:     end
172:   end
173: 
174:   def update_immediate_attributes!
175:     @status.text         = @status_parser.processed_text
176:     @status.spoiler_text = @status_parser.processed_spoiler_text
177:     @status.sensitive    = @account.sensitized? || @status_parser.sensitive || false
178:     @status.language     = @status_parser.language
179: 
180:     @significant_changes = text_significantly_changed? || @status.spoiler_text_changed? || @media_attachments_changed || @poll_changed || @quote_changed
181: 
182:     @status.edited_at = @status_parser.edited_at if significant_changes?
183: 
184:     @status.save!
185:   end
186: 
187:   def update_metadata!
188:     @raw_tags = []
189:     @raw_mentions = []
190:     @raw_tagged_objects = []
191:     @raw_emojis = []
192: 
193:     as_array(@json['tag']).each do |tag|
194:       if equals_or_includes?(tag['type'], 'Hashtag')
195:         @raw_tags << tag['name'] if tag['name'].present?
196:       elsif equals_or_includes?(tag['type'], 'Mention')
197:         @raw_mentions << tag['href'] if tag['href'].present?
198:       elsif equals_or_includes?(tag['type'], 'Emoji')
199:         @raw_emojis << tag
200:       elsif equals_or_includes?(tag['type'], 'FeaturedCollection')
201:         @raw_tagged_objects << tag if tag['id']
202:       end
203:     end
204: 
205:     update_tags!
206:     update_tagged_objects!
207:     update_mentions!
208:     update_emojis!
209:     update_quote!
210:   end
211: 
212:   def update_tags!
213:     previous_tags = @status.tags.to_a
214:     current_tags = @status.tags = @raw_tags.flat_map do |tag|
215:       Tag.find_or_create_by_names([tag])
216:     rescue ActiveRecord::RecordInvalid
217:       []
218:     end.uniq
219: 
220:     return unless @status.distributable?
221: 
222:     added_tags = current_tags - previous_tags
223: 
224:     unless added_tags.empty?
225:       @account.featured_tags.where(tag_id: added_tags.pluck(:id)).find_each do |featured_tag|
226:         featured_tag.increment(@status.created_at)
227:       end
228:     end
229: 
230:     removed_tags = previous_tags - current_tags
231: 
232:     unless removed_tags.empty?
233:       @account.featured_tags.where(tag_id: removed_tags.pluck(:id)).find_each do |featured_tag|
234:         featured_tag.decrement(@status)
235:       end
236:     end
237:   end
238: 
239:   def update_tagged_objects!
240:     unresolved_tagged_objects = []
241: 
242:     current_tagged_objects = @raw_tagged_objects.filter_map do |tagged_object|
243:       url = tagged_object['id']
244: 
245:       # TODO: We probably want to resolve unknown objects at authoring time
246:       collection = ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_to_resource(url, Collection)
247:       collection ||= ActivityPub::FetchRemoteFeaturedCollectionService.new.call(url, request_id: @request_id)
248: 
249:       collection
250:     rescue Mastodon::UnexpectedResponseError, *Mastodon::HTTP_CONNECTION_ERRORS
251:       # Since previous tagged objects are about already-known collections,
252:       # they don't try to resolve again and won't fall into this case.
253:       # In other words, this failure case is only for new collections and can safely be retried later
254:       unresolved_tagged_objects << url
255:       nil
256:     end
257: 
258:     # Any previously-unresolved URI would be resolved here
259:     @status.tagged_objects.upsert_all(
260:       current_tagged_objects.uniq.map { |object| { object_type: object.class.name, object_id: object.id, uri: ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(object), ap_type: 'FeaturedCollection' } },
261:       unique_by: %w(status_id uri)
262:     )
263: 
264:     # Remove unused links
265:     @status.tagged_objects.where.not(uri: current_tagged_objects.map { |object| ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(object) }).delete_all
266: 
267:     # Queue unresolved collections for later
268:     unresolved_tagged_objects.uniq.each do |uri|
269:       TaggedCollectionResolveWorker.perform_in(rand(PROCESSING_DELAY), @status.id, uri, { 'request_id' => @request_id })
270:     end
271:   end
272: 
273:   def update_mentions!
274:     unresolved_mentions = []
275: 
276:     currently_mentioned_account_ids = @raw_mentions.filter_map do |href|
277:       next if href.blank?
278: 
279:       account   = ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_to_resource(href, Account)
280:       account ||= ActivityPub::FetchRemoteAccountService.new.call(href, request_id: @request_id)
281: 
282:       account&.id
283:     rescue Mastodon::UnexpectedResponseError, *Mastodon::HTTP_CONNECTION_ERRORS
284:       # Since previous mentions are about already-known accounts,
285:       # they don't try to resolve again and won't fall into this case.
286:       # In other words, this failure case is only for new mentions and won't
287:       # affect `removed_mentions` so they can safely be retried asynchronously
288:       unresolved_mentions << href
289:       nil
290:     end
291: 
292:     @status.mentions.upsert_all(currently_mentioned_account_ids.uniq.map { |id| { account_id: id, silent: false } }, unique_by: %w(status_id account_id))
293: 
294:     # If previous mentions are no longer contained in the text, convert them
295:     # to silent mentions, since withdrawing access from someone who already
296:     # received a notification might be more confusing
297:     @status.mentions.where.not(account_id: currently_mentioned_account_ids).update_all(silent: true)
298: 
299:     # Queue unresolved mentions for later
300:     unresolved_mentions.uniq.each do |uri|
301:       MentionResolveWorker.perform_in(rand(PROCESSING_DELAY), @status.id, uri, { 'request_id' => @request_id })
302:     end
303:   end
304: 
305:   def update_emojis!
306:     return if skip_download?
307: 
308:     @raw_emojis.each do |raw_emoji|
309:       custom_emoji_parser = ActivityPub::Parser::CustomEmojiParser.new(raw_emoji)
310: 
311:       next if custom_emoji_parser.shortcode.blank? || custom_emoji_parser.image_remote_url.blank?
312: 
313:       emoji = CustomEmoji.find_by(shortcode: custom_emoji_parser.shortcode, domain: @account.domain)
314: 
315:       next unless emoji.nil? || custom_emoji_parser.image_remote_url != emoji.image_remote_url || (custom_emoji_parser.updated_at && custom_emoji_parser.updated_at >= emoji.updated_at)
316: 
317:       begin
318:         emoji ||= CustomEmoji.new(domain: @account.domain, shortcode: custom_emoji_parser.shortcode, uri: custom_emoji_parser.uri)
319:         emoji.image_remote_url = custom_emoji_parser.image_remote_url
320:         emoji.save
321:       rescue Seahorse::Client::NetworkingError => e
322:         Rails.logger.warn "Error storing emoji: #{e}"
323:       end
324:     end
325:   end
326: 
327:   # This method is only concerned with approval and skips other meaningful changes,
328:   # as it is used instead of `update_quote!` in implicit updates
329:   def update_quote_approval!
330:     quote_uri = @status_parser.quote_uri
331:     return unless quote_uri.present? && @status.quote.present?
332: 
333:     quote = @status.quote
334:     return if quote.quoted_status.present? && (ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(quote.quoted_status) != quote_uri || quote.quoted_status.local?)
335: 
336:     approval_uri = @status_parser.quote_approval_uri
337:     approval_uri = nil if unsupported_uri_scheme?(approval_uri) || TagManager.instance.local_url?(approval_uri)
338: 
339:     quote.update(approval_uri: nil, state: :pending, legacy: @status_parser.legacy_quote?) if quote.approval_uri.present? && quote.approval_uri != @status_parser.quote_approval_uri
340: 
341:     fetch_and_verify_quote!(quote, approval_uri, quote_uri)
342:   end
343: 
344:   def update_quote!
345:     quote_uri = @status_parser.quote_uri
346: 
347:     if @status_parser.quote?
348:       approval_uri = @status_parser.quote_approval_uri
349:       approval_uri = nil if unsupported_uri_scheme?(approval_uri) || TagManager.instance.local_url?(approval_uri)
350: 
351:       if @status.quote.present?
352:         # If the quoted post has changed, discard the old object and create a new one
353:         if @status.quote.quoted_status.present? && ActivityPub::TagManager.instance.uri_for(@status.quote.quoted_status) != quote_uri
354:           # Revoke the quote while we get a chance… maybe this should be a `before_destroy` hook?
355:           RevokeQuoteService.new.call(@status.quote) if @status.quote.quoted_account&.local? && @status.quote.accepted?
356:           @status.quote.destroy
357:           quote = Quote.create(status: @status, approval_uri: nil, legacy: @status_parser.legacy_quote?, state: @status_parser.deleted_quote? ? :deleted : :pending)
358:           @quote_changed = true
359:         else
360:           quote = @status.quote
361:           quote.update(approval_uri: nil, state: :pending, legacy: @status_parser.legacy_quote?) if quote.approval_uri.present? && quote.approval_uri != approval_uri
362:         end
363:       else
364:         quote = Quote.create(status: @status, approval_uri: nil, legacy: @status_parser.legacy_quote?)
365:         @quote_changed = true
366:       end
367: 
368:       @quote = quote
369:       @quote_approval_uri = approval_uri
370: 
371:       quote.save
372:     elsif @status.quote.present?
373:       @quote = nil
374:       @status.quote.destroy!
375:       @quote_changed = true
376:     end
377:   end
378: 
379:   def fetch_and_verify_quote!(quote, approval_uri, quote_uri)
380:     embedded_quote = safe_prefetched_embed(@account, @status_parser.quoted_object, @activity_json['context'])
381:     ActivityPub::VerifyQuoteService.new.call(quote, approval_uri, fetchable_quoted_uri: quote_uri, prefetched_quoted_object: embedded_quote, request_id: @request_id)
382:   rescue Mastodon::UnexpectedResponseError, *Mastodon::HTTP_CONNECTION_ERRORS
383:     ActivityPub::RefetchAndVerifyQuoteWorker.perform_in(rand(PROCESSING_DELAY), quote.id, quote_uri, { 'request_id' => @request_id, 'approval_uri' => approval_uri })
384:   end
385: 
386:   def update_counts!
387:     likes = @status_parser.favourites_count
388:     shares =  @status_parser.reblogs_count
389:     return if likes.nil? && shares.nil?
390: 
391:     @status.status_stat.tap do |status_stat|
392:       status_stat.untrusted_reblogs_count = shares unless shares.nil?
393:       status_stat.untrusted_favourites_count = likes unless likes.nil?
394: 
395:       status_stat.save if status_stat.changed?
396:     end
397:   end
398: 
399:   def expected_type?
400:     equals_or_includes_any?(@json['type'], ActivityPub::Activity::SUPPORTED_TYPES) || equals_or_includes_any?(@json['type'], ActivityPub::Activity::CONVERTED_TYPES)
401:   end
402: 
403:   def record_previous_edit!
404:     @previous_edit = @status.build_snapshot(at_time: @status.created_at, rate_limit: false) if @status.edits.empty?
405:   end
406: 
407:   def create_edits!
408:     return unless significant_changes?
409: 
410:     @previous_edit&.save!
411:     @status.snapshot!(account_id: @account.id, rate_limit: false)
412:   end
413: 
414:   def skip_download?
415:     return @skip_download if defined?(@skip_download)
416: 
417:     @skip_download ||= DomainBlock.reject_media?(@account.domain)
418:   end
419: 
420:   def unsupported_media_type?(mime_type)
421:     mime_type.present? && !MediaAttachment.supported_mime_types.include?(mime_type)
422:   end
423: 
424:   def significant_changes?
425:     @significant_changes
426:   end
427: 
428:   def text_significantly_changed?
429:     return false unless @status.text_changed?
430: 
431:     old, new = @status.text_change
432:     HtmlAwareFormatter.new(old, false).to_s != HtmlAwareFormatter.new(new, false).to_s
433:   end
434: 
435:   def already_updated_more_recently?
436:     @status.edited_at.present? && @status_parser.edited_at.present? && @status.edited_at > @status_parser.edited_at
437:   end
438: 
439:   def reset_preview_card!
440:     @status.reset_preview_card!
441:     LinkCrawlWorker.perform_in(rand(CRAWL_DELAY), @status.id)
442:   end
443: 
444:   def broadcast_updates!
445:     ::DistributionWorker.perform_async(@status.id, { 'update' => true })
446:   end
447: 
448:   def queue_poll_notifications!
449:     poll = @status.preloadable_poll
450: 
451:     # If the poll had no expiration date set but now has, or now has a sooner
452:     # expiration date, and people have voted, schedule a notification
453: 
454:     return unless poll.present? && poll.expires_at.present? && poll.votes.exists?
455: 
456:     # If the poll had previously expired, notifications should have already been sent out (or scheduled),
457:     # and re-scheduling them would cause duplicate notifications for people who had already dismissed them
458:     # (see #37948)
459:     return if @previous_expires_at&.past?
460: 
461:     PollExpirationNotifyWorker.remove_from_scheduled(poll.id) if @previous_expires_at.present? && @previous_expires_at > poll.expires_at
462:     PollExpirationNotifyWorker.perform_at(poll.expires_at + 5.minutes, poll.id)
463:   end
464: 
465:   def forward_activity!
466:     forwarder.forward! if forwarder.forwardable?
467:   end
468: 
469:   def forwarder
470:     @forwarder ||= ActivityPub::Forwarder.new(@account, @activity_json, @status)
471:   end
472: end
